meta.description: Example profile: used cars under $15K in the Pacific Northwest. The scorer reads this before evaluating each listing.

price_scoring._comment: Tiered scoring. Cheaper = better within reason.
price_scoring.scoring_note: Under 10K gets a score boost. 10K-15K scored normally. Over 15K is a hard reject.

mileage_scoring._comment: Lower mileage is better, but high-mileage Toyotas are still fine.
mileage_scoring.scoring_note: Under 50K miles gets a boost. 50K-80K normal. 80K-120K mild penalty. Over 120K is a hard reject unless it's a Toyota or Honda.

target_regions.scoring_note: Primary regions get a score boost. Secondary regions scored normally. California, Nevada = reject (too far to inspect).

condition.scoring_note: Clean title + runs well is ideal. Minor cosmetic issues are fine. Mechanical issues only if price is very low (<$5K).

flags_not_rejects._comment: Surface these with a note, do not auto-reject.
items: single owner — generally a good sign
no maintenance records — could be fine, needs inspection
aftermarket modifications — check if tasteful or warranty-voiding
out-of-state title — may need emissions re-test
dealer listing vs private seller — note for price negotiation context
no photos or very few photos — might be hidden gem or red flag

features_not_scored._comment: Noted but don't affect score yet.

scoring_thresholds.preference: Prefer false negatives over false positives. Buyer's time is limited.

output_format.notable_features: list of observed features from the features_not_scored list
